content_body:
We came for a long weekend away and found ourselves in a beautiful cabin, on a beautiful lake, and with a beautiful view! We found some hiking in the area but we were happy to come back to such a beautiful, comfortable, and clean place each evening. We also enjoyed a bottle of wine down by the lake at sunset, a soak in the hot tub after a long day's hike, a cup of coffee in the morning as the sun rose over the mountains, and sipping hot chocolate in front of the the fire.  Our last night in Blue Ridge we had dinner at the Toccoa Riverside Resturant and it was absolutely delicious, down to the very last bite! Thank you for sharing your home and little peace of heaven with us! 

 -The Deloach Family
title: Blue Ridge Lake Retreat is the Perfect Weekend Getaway
